card.body:
Happy birthday, *Kam.*
my calm, my love, my baby, my man.

modal.heading: Chapter 27, *Kam*.
paragraphs:
I wonder what kind of baby you were? Like on the 8th of May in 1999 did you just come into this world with that baritone that gets a little deeper when you want to say something really cute or really annoying. 
Did you cry a lot? What were you into? I wish I knew you sooner. That when we met i took you seriously even if it meant seeing you like my brother, friend and nothing more. We would be inseparable. Be we still got time. We still got time right?? I mean God has been kind. He has been faithful. 27 years is not guaranteed but look at us, look at you at a time like this, in a new country oceans away, finishing up your masters, looking forward to a new season of your life, thanking God for the gift of another year to spend here on earth. 
Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life? I know that God will give you all the clarity you need to answer this question and fulfil his purpose for you in this life
I love the man that you are. The one that loves me. That really sees me. That loves to figure things out. That sees the good in others. The man that is wise and kind and patient. Slow to anger and quick to listen. You make me a better person. Did you know? I already told you I’m much likely to do jail lol. Thank God for the man he's molding you into. The kind that is not too proud to change. To see a different perspective. The kind that does not insist on himself. Not stuck in his ways. You are my calm and I want to love you forever. I don’t really know the full extent of that sentence but I’m becoming less and less afraid of letting myself find out. 
You did that. You are doing that. Thank God for making it possible.

I don’t know if I’m writing about your birthday or about us. I keep drifting in and out of those threads. 

But my God, I’m so happy he made you and I didn’t lose sight of what was always in front of me.
Happy birthday to the man that’s been always there beside me.  
To chapter 27.

Always, lotam 
Ps: write me one back xx. I’m serious lol
